summary: Website project for "MORSHID" with 3 pages (Home, For Farmers, Contact), defined color palette, shared sticky header/footer, persistent floating WhatsApp button, all three pages fully built out with marketing sections, uploaded MORSHID logo in header/footer/hero, font sizes 15-25% larger, and now with full bilingual (English/French) support via a language switcher in the header and farmer-friendly French translations of all website content while keeping the name "MORSHID" unchanged in both languages; do not change anything else.
architectural_notes: Header and footer should be shared across all pages; header must remain sticky during scroll.
Scope change: Home page should now include full sectioned content as specified; keep other pages/components unchanged unless explicitly requested.
For Farmers page scope update: add 2 more sections below Services (FAQ accordion on #F5F5F5 + final CTA on #25D366) exactly as specified; do not change other pages/components.

Scope update: Contact page must be fully built with title/subtitle, 3 contact cards (WhatsApp, Email, Location) and a response-time note below; preserve existing header/footer/floating WhatsApp button and do not change other pages/components.

Site-wide constraint for QA pass: primary green must be exactly #25D366 everywhere; standardize button styling (rounded corners + consistent padding) and card styling (shadows + consistent borders) without changing layout/content beyond necessary fixes.
Verify cross-page behaviors: header must be sticky on all pages; floating WhatsApp button must be visible on all pages; all internal/external links must work; YouTube embeds must render properly.
Asset quality requirement: all marketing/hero images should be high-quality and depict Moroccan farmers; do not otherwise alter page structure/content.
Home hero: below the "Get Free Help on WhatsApp" button, add small white text exactly: "Available 24/7 • Free • Voice & Text".
Header nav links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) must be more visible: larger font size, bold weight, and hover color exactly #25D366; keep header sticky with white background and light shadow.
Navigation UX: highlight active/current page link in #25D366 and add underline effect on hover for header nav links (no other header changes).
known_issues: Potential brand-style conflict: For Farmers Services Card 2 requires a blue border (#03A9F4) despite prior guidance to avoid blue/purple in the theme.
Potential brand-style conflict: Contact Card 2 specifies a blue theme despite prior guidance to avoid blue/purple in the site theme.
Need to verify and correct any greens not exactly #25D366 across the site.
Buttons may be inconsistently styled (corner radius/padding) across pages; standardize.
Cards may lack consistent shadows/borders; standardize.
Header stickiness may not be applied on all pages; verify and fix.
Floating WhatsApp button visibility may not be consistent across all pages; verify and fix.
Some images may not be high quality and/or may not depict Moroccan farmers; verify and replace/fix if needed.
Some links may be broken/incorrect; verify all links across the site.
YouTube videos may not display properly; verify embeds and fix if needed.

existing_features.title: Create a 3-page website structure for “MORSHID” with routes/pages: Home, For Farmers, and Contact, and ensure navigation between them works from the header.

Implement the global site theme colors exactly as specified: Primary green #25D366, Dark green #1B5E20, Light gray #F5F5F5, White background, and Text #333333, and apply them consistently across header, footer, and floating WhatsApp button.

Build a sticky header (always visible on scroll) with: left-aligned “MORSHID” logo text in dark green (#1B5E20) and bold weight; right-side navigation links: Home, For Farmers, Contact; header background white with a subtle light shadow.
Build a footer with dark green background (#1B5E20), a white “MORSHID” logo text, and a single line of text exactly: “Rabat, Morocco | hello@tmu.ai | +212 623 237 732 | © TMU SARL”.

Add a floating WhatsApp button that appears on all pages, anchored to the bottom-right, always visible while scrolling, using primary green (#25D366) with a WhatsApp icon, linking to https://wa.me/212623237732.

Do not add page content yet: each page should render only the shared layout (header/footer/WhatsApp button) with an otherwise empty main content area (no marketing sections, paragraphs, forms, maps, or placeholder copy).

Apply one coherent visual theme direction (typography, spacing, and component styling) consistent with an agricultural advisory brand, using the provided green palette and light neutrals (avoid blue/purple).

Implement the Home page content (route "/") by replacing the current empty HomePage component with a complete, scrollable page containing exactly the 6 sections specified by the user: (1) Hero with full-width background image, white headline/subtitle, primary green WhatsApp CTA button linking to https://wa.me/212623237732, and the small availability text; (2) Four Pillars section on light gray #F5F5F5 with title/subtitle and 4 cards in a single row on desktop (responsive stacking on smaller screens) with white backgrounds, shadows, and the specified colored top borders and icons; (3) Videos section with title and two large, side-by-side embedded YouTube videos for https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=19kU6cAwXXk and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DnTsf91_UCk; (4) How It Works section with title/subtitle and 3 steps in a row with arrows between them, each step showing a numbered circle, the specified Lucide icons, step title, and step description, plus a green WhatsApp CTA button linking to https://wa.me/212623237732; (5) Trust section on light green #E8F5E9 containing (a) title and 3 stat boxes with the exact texts provided and (b) a "What Farmers Say" title with two testimonial cards with the exact quotes and attributions provided; (6) Final CTA section on dark green #1B5E20 with the specified white title/subtitle/text, a large white button linking to https://wa.me/212623237732, a smaller outlined button linking to http://app.morshid.ai, and the WhatsApp number shown as +212 623 237 732.

Add the generated Hero background image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and use it as the Hero section background (e.g., via CSS background-image/overlay) ensuring headline/subtitle remain clearly readable in white over the image.

Replace the current placeholder For Farmers page (route "/for-farmers") with a complete page containing exactly two sections: (1) a Hero section with a full-width background image, white title/subtitle text, and a green CTA button linking to WhatsApp; and (2) a Services section on a white background with a title and four service cards in a 2x2 grid on desktop (responsive for smaller screens).

Add the For Farmers Hero background image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and use it as the For Farmers Hero section background image (via CSS background-image or equivalent), ensuring the Hero title/subtitle remain clearly readable in white over the image.

Update the For Farmers page (route "/for-farmers", component "frontend/src/pages/ForFarmersPage.tsx") by adding a new SECTION 3 (FAQ) directly below the existing Services section, without changing the existing Hero or Services sections.
Update the For Farmers page ("frontend/src/pages/ForFarmersPage.tsx") by adding a new SECTION 4 (CTA) directly below the new FAQ section, without changing any other pages or shared components.

Replace the current empty Contact page (route "/contact", file "frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx") with a complete page that renders: (1) a page title "Contact Us"; (2) a subtitle "We're here to help"; (3) three contact cards in a single row on desktop (responsive stacking on smaller screens) with the exact card contents and links specified; and (4) a line of text below the cards that reads exactly: "Response time: Usually within 1 hour on WhatsApp".

Audit the entire MORSHID frontend and ensure every green UI color used anywhere on the site is exactly hex #25D366 (including backgrounds, text, borders, icons, hover/focus states, and Tailwind/CSS variables), replacing any other green values (including dark/light greens) with #25D366 without changing any other non-green colors.

Standardize button styling site-wide so all buttons share the same visual style: rounded corners and consistent padding/height across all pages and sections, without editing any files under frontend/src/components/ui (immutable).

Standardize card styling site-wide so all cards have shadows and consistent borders (same border width/color and shadow intensity), across all pages, without editing any files under frontend/src/components/ui (immutable).

Ensure all images used across the site are high-quality and clearly depict Moroccan farmers; if any existing generated hero images do not meet this standard, update/replace them while keeping the same file paths referenced in code.

Validate that all links across the site work correctly and point to the intended destinations (navigation links, WhatsApp links, mailto link, external app link, and any footer attribution link), and fix any incorrect/broken links without changing displayed text.

Verify the two YouTube videos on the Home page display properly (correct embed URLs, responsive sizing, and not blocked by incorrect iframe attributes) and fix any embed issues while keeping the same video IDs.

Replace the Home page hero background image with a new high-quality AI-generated image matching the user's description, while keeping the exact same asset filename and path currently used by the Home hero section ("/assets/generated/morshid-hero-farmer-family.dim_1920x1080.png").

Update the header navigation link styling to be more visible by making the navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) use a larger font size and bold text, and apply a hover text color effect of exactly #25D366, without changing the header structure, labels, or destinations.

Update the header navigation link styling so the current route link is highlighted in exactly #25D366 and all navigation links show an underline effect on hover, without changing header structure, labels, or link destinations.

Ensure site-wide button styling is consistent and includes rounded corners and a shadow-on-hover effect for every button (including links rendered as buttons), without editing any files under frontend/src/components/ui.

Standardize card styling across the site so all cards have: white background, light shadow, rounded corners, and a colored top border that matches each card’s theme (while keeping existing non-green theme colors like blue/orange/brown where they already exist).

Adjust section background styling across all pages so major sections alternate between white, light gray (#F5F5F5), and light green (#E8F5E9) for visual variety, without changing any copy, images, links, or section order.

Add the uploaded logo image file ("logo MORSHID.png") to the frontend as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated, and reference it from the UI using a working public URL path (handle the space in the filename correctly).

Update the header component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) to display the uploaded logo image on the left side before the navigation menu, without removing or altering any existing navigation links, labels, destinations, or styling behavior (active link highlight, hover underline, hover color). Do not replace "MORSHID" in sentence text elsewhere.

Update the footer component (frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx) to display the uploaded logo image at the top of the footer content, while keeping all existing footer text exactly as-is (including: "Rabat, Morocco | hello@tmu.ai | +212 623 237 732 | © TMU SARL" and the caffeine.ai attribution block).

Update the Home page hero section (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to display the uploaded logo image centered above the main hero headline, without changing any existing hero copy, buttons/links, background image, overlay, or section structure.

Fix the logo image rendering so the actual uploaded MORSHID logo displays (not a black placeholder) everywhere it is used (header, footer, and Home hero), without changing any other UI, copy, styling, layout, links, or behavior.

Update the Home page (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) "See MORSHID in Action" videos section to include a third embedded YouTube video for https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FAGAphpcsHI alongside the existing two videos, and adjust the layout so all three videos render the same size and are visually aligned.
Update the Home page hero section (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to make the MORSHID logo image clickable, triggering a popup card modal when clicked.

Create a popup card component that displays with title 'With MORSHID', message text 'Nothing to lose, everything to gain. Expert advice, saved time, better harvests, higher profits.', and an X close button in the top-right corner.
Ensure the popup only appears when clicking the MORSHID logo in the Home page hero section, and does not appear when clicking the logo in the header or footer.

Replace the Home page hero background image (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) with a new AI-generated high-quality image while keeping the exact same asset filename and path '/assets/generated/morshid-hero-farmer-family.dim_1920x1080.png'; do not change any other hero section elements (logo, headline, subtitle, CTA button, availability text, overlay, or layout).

Increase all base font sizes by 50% in frontend/src/index.css by modifying the root font-size or by updating all text size utility classes used throughout the application (headings, body text, paragraphs, lists, labels).

Increase font sizes by 50% in the SiteHeader component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) for all navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) without changing the header structure, layout, logo, colors, hover effects, or active link highlighting.

Increase font sizes by 50% for all button text across the site including MorshidButton component (frontend/src/components/MorshidButton.tsx), WhatsAppFloatingButton (frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloatingButton.tsx), and any inline button implementations in pages (HomePage, ForFarmersPage, ContactPage) without changing button styling, colors, rounded corners, hover effects, or shadows.

Increase font sizes by 50% in the SiteFooter component (frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx) for all footer text including the contact information line and Caffeine.ai attribution without changing the footer layout, colors, logo, or content.

Increase font sizes by 50% in the HomePage component (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) for all text elements including hero headline/subtitle/availability text, section titles, card text, testimonial quotes, stats text, and CTA text without changing any layouts, images, colors, backgrounds, spacing, or component structure.

Increase font sizes by 50% in the ForFarmersPage component (frontend/src/pages/ForFarmersPage.tsx) for all text elements including hero title/subtitle, service card titles/descriptions, FAQ questions/answers, and CTA section text without changing any layouts, images, colors, backgrounds, accordion functionality, or component structure.

Increase font sizes by 50% in the ContactPage component (frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx) for the page title, subtitle, card titles/descriptions, and response-time note text without changing card layouts, colors, icons, links, or component structure.

Increase font sizes by 50% in the LogoPopup component (frontend/src/components/LogoPopup.tsx) for the title 'With MORSHID' and message text without changing the modal structure, close button, backdrop, or click-outside-to-close functionality.

Reduce all font sizes in frontend/src/index.css by adjusting the root font-size or text size utility classes so that all base font sizes (headings, body text, paragraphs, lists, labels) are only 15-25% larger than the original size, not 50% larger.

Reduce font sizes in the SiteHeader component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) for all navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) from 50% increase to 15-25% larger than original, without changing the header structure, layout, logo, colors, hover effects, or active link highlighting.

Reduce font sizes for all button text across the site to 15-25% larger than original (from 50% increase) including MorshidButton component (frontend/src/components/MorshidButton.tsx), WhatsAppFloatingButton (frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloatingButton.tsx), and any inline button implementations in pages (HomePage, ForFarmersPage, ContactPage) without changing button styling, colors, rounded corners, hover effects, or shadows.

Reduce font sizes in the SiteFooter component (frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx) from 50% increase to 15-25% larger than original for all footer text including the contact information line and Caffeine.ai attribution, without changing the footer layout, colors, logo, or content.

Reduce font sizes in the HomePage component (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) from 50% increase to 15-25% larger than original for all text elements including hero headline/subtitle/availability text, section titles, card text, testimonial quotes, stats text, and CTA text, without changing any layouts, images, colors, backgrounds, spacing, or component structure.

Reduce font sizes in the ForFarmersPage component (frontend/src/pages/ForFarmersPage.tsx) from 50% increase to 15-25% larger than original for all text elements including hero title/subtitle, service card titles/descriptions, FAQ questions/answers, and CTA section text, without changing any layouts, images, colors, backgrounds, accordion functionality, or component structure.

Reduce font sizes in the ContactPage component (frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx) from 50% increase to 15-25% larger than original for the page title, subtitle, card titles/descriptions, and response-time note text, without changing card layouts, colors, icons, links, or component structure.

Reduce font sizes in the LogoPopup component (frontend/src/components/LogoPopup.tsx) from 50% increase to 15-25% larger than original for the title 'With MORSHID' and message text, without changing the modal structure, close button, backdrop, or click-outside-to-close functionality.

Update the SiteHeader component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) to reduce the horizontal spacing/gap between navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) so they appear closer together and less spread out, without changing the header structure, logo, link labels, destinations, font sizes, colors, active link highlighting, or hover effects.

Update the HomePage component (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) "See MORSHID in Action" videos section to add two new embedded YouTube videos for https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=15sPMyEQtbk and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbUlArhso58 alongside the existing videos, and ensure all videos (existing + new) are rendered at the same size and are visually aligned, without changing any other page sections, copy, images, or layout.

Create a language switcher UI component in the header (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) that allows users to toggle between English and French languages, displayed as either 'EN | FR' text or flag icons, positioned near the navigation menu and easily visible without changing the header structure, logo, or existing navigation links.

Implement language state management using React context or state hooks to track the currently selected language (English or French) and provide it to all components across the application, with the default language set to English.

Translate all text content on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to clear, simple French that farmers can easily understand, including hero headline, subtitle, availability text, section titles, Four Pillars card content, How It Works step descriptions, testimonials, stats text, and all CTA button labels, while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged in both languages and ensuring translations are natural and relatable to farmers rather than technical.

Translate all text content in the header component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) to French, including navigation link labels ('Home' → 'Accueil', 'For Farmers' → 'Pour les Agriculteurs', 'Contact' → 'Contact'), while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged in the logo and ensuring the language switcher itself displays correctly in both languages.

Expert advice, saved time, better harvests, higher profits.', while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged and ensuring the modal structure, close button, and click-outside-to-close functionality remain unchanged.

Debug and fix the runtime error occurring when using the language switcher in the SiteHeader component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) that displays 'Something went wrong!' to the user; ensure the EN/FR toggle button works without errors.

Add error boundary handling around the language switcher button in SiteHeader to catch and log any errors that occur during language toggle, preventing the entire application from crashing and providing a fallback UI.
Remove the LanguageContext provider and all language switching functionality from the application (frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx) to restore the site to its pre-language-switcher state.

Remove the language switcher button (EN/FR toggle) from the SiteHeader component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) and restore the header to display only the MORSHID logo and navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) with existing styling (active link highlight in #25D366, hover underline effect).

Replace all translated text content across all pages (HomePage, ForFarmersPage, ContactPage) and components (SiteHeader, SiteFooter, WhatsAppFloatingButton, LogoPopup) with English-only text, removing all calls to translation functions (t()) and restoring original English copy.

Translate all text content on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to clear, simple French that farmers can easily understand, including hero headline, subtitle, availability text, section titles, Four Pillars card content, How It Works step descriptions, testimonials, stats text, and all CTA button labels, while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged in both languages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create MORSHID website structure with pages: Home, For Farmers, Contact (no page content yet)
Implement global theme colors: Primary #25D366, Dark green #1B5E20, Light gray #F5F5F5, White background, Text #333333
Build sticky header with MORSHID logo (dark green, bold) and nav links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) on white background with light shadow
Build footer with dark green background, white MORSHID logo, and contact line: Rabat, Morocco | hello@tmu.ai | +212 623 237 732 | © TMU SARL
Add floating WhatsApp button on all pages (bottom-right, #25D366 with icon) linking to https://wa.me/212623237732; always visible on scroll

Build out the Home page with the specified 6 sections (Hero w/ AI background image + WhatsApp CTA, Four Pillars cards, embedded YouTube videos, How It Works steps, Trust stats/testimonials, Final CTA including app download link) without changing other pages/components

Build out the For Farmers page with a Hero section (AI background image + title/subtitle + WhatsApp CTA) and a Services section (4 service cards with specified icons, colored borders, copy, and WhatsApp buttons) without changing anything else
Extend For Farmers page by adding an FAQ accordion section (gray #F5F5F5) and a final CTA section (green #25D366) below the existing Services section; do not change anything else
Build the Contact page with title/subtitle, 3 contact cards (WhatsApp #25D366, Email blue w/ mailto, Location gray), and a response-time note below; keep shared layout and do not change anything else

Site-wide QA/polish pass: enforce exact #25D366 greens, consistent button/card styling, verify sticky header + floating WhatsApp, ensure high-quality Moroccan farmer images, validate all links, and confirm YouTube embeds render correctly (do not change anything else)

Verify the header remains sticky on every route and during scrolling, and fix any cases where it is not sticky (including z-index/overlap issues), without changing header content or navigation structure.
Verify the floating WhatsApp button is visible on all pages and remains fixed while scrolling; fix any route/layout issues that could prevent it from rendering.

Update Home page hero: replace hero background image with new high-quality AI image (Moroccan farmer family in bright green wheat field, Atlas mountains, father holding smartphone w/ WhatsApp) and add small white availability text under the WhatsApp CTA button: "Available 24/7 • Free • Voice & Text"; update header nav link styling (larger, bold, green hover #25D366) while keeping header sticky with white background + light shadow; do not change anything else
On the Home page hero section, ensure there is small white text directly below the "Get Free Help on WhatsApp" button that reads exactly: "Available 24/7 • Free • Voice & Text".
Site-wide: ensure all green UI colors are exactly #25D366 and standardize button styling (rounded corners + hover shadow) without changing anything else
Site-wide: standardize card styling (white background, light shadow, rounded corners, colored top border matching theme) without changing anything else
Navigation: highlight the current page link in #25D366 and add an underline-on-hover effect for nav links (keep everything else unchanged)
Section backgrounds: alternate between white, light gray #F5F5F5, and light green #E8F5E9 across the site for visual variety (do not change anything else)
Add uploaded MORSHID logo image in header (left before nav), footer (top), and Home hero (centered above main headline) without replacing any "MORSHID" sentence text or changing anything else

Home page: In the "See MORSHID in Action" videos section, add a third YouTube video (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FAGAphpcsHI) alongside the existing videos, and ensure all videos are the same size and aligned (do not change anything else)

Home page hero logo: make it clickable to show a popup card with title "With MORSHID", message "Nothing to lose, everything to gain. Expert advice, saved time, better harvests, higher profits.", and X close button (only for hero logo, not header/footer logos)

Replace Home page hero background image with a new high-quality AI-generated image: happy Moroccan farmer family in bright green wheat field, sunny/clear blue sky, vibrant colors, golden sunlight, warm/hopeful feeling, father holding smartphone, green crops, light/cheerful atmosphere (do not change anything else)

Replace the Home page hero background image (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) with a new AI-generated high-quality image while keeping the exact same asset filename and path '/assets/generated/morshid-hero-farmer-family.dim_1920x1080.png'; do not change any other hero section elements (logo, headline, subtitle, CTA button, availability text, overlay, or layout).

Site-wide: reduce font sizes from 50% increase to only 15-25% larger than original across all text (headings, paragraphs, buttons, nav links, footer); make readable but not overwhelming; do not change anything else
Site-wide navigation: reduce width/spacing of navigation menu (Home, For Farmers, Contact) to make items closer together; do not change anything else

Home page: Add 2 new YouTube videos (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=15sPMyEQtbk and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbUlArhso58) to the "See MORSHID in Action" videos section alongside existing videos; ensure all videos are the same size and aligned; do not change anything else
